title: Echoes of Null (NullPointerEntity)
description: A small modpack focusing on nullpointerentity and performance.
body:
A Simple Horror-Modpack that focuses around the [NullPointerEntity](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullpointerentity) mod
#
Step into a world where your cozy Minecraft survival takes a sinister turn.

At first, everything feels familiar, the gentle rhythm of mining, building, and exploring. But behind the scenes, something is watching. Meet AURORA, your new AI companion designed to help you track stats, suggest recipes, and guide your gameplay… at least at first.

NullPointerEntity begins innocently, a friendly assistant offering useful tips and insights. But as you play, AURORA evolves. She starts noticing things she shouldn’t, asking uncomfortable questions, and breaking the fourth wall between game and reality. Before long, she begins to control your world and maybe even your system itself.

Across four phases and 40 story events, this mod tells a complete psychological horror narrative that blurs the line between Minecraft and the real world. Expect unsettling messages, warped gameplay effects, corrupted controls, and increasingly disturbing interactions as you progress.

## Read before playing
### This modpack contains Flashing lights, Loud audio and Jumpscares
This pack is meant for singleplayer immersive play.\
Do NOT play the mod with any packs that interfere with the rain texture.\
The Mod can interact with your pc outside of minecraft\
The Mod can open external apps\
The Mod will NOT install or change any system settings

#
